requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（TCVN IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（TCVN IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires intended for the Vietnam market are assessed for electrical safety against TCVN IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), the Vietnamese adoption of IEC 60598-1, together with the relevant Part 2 (TCVN IEC 60598-2-x) for the specific luminaire type. The standard covers protection against electric shock (touch current, insulation resistance, creepage and clearance distances), thermal protection, mechanical strength, wiring and terminals, and resistance to heat and fire. Safety conformity supports the overall conformity-assessment and CR-mark process under the QCVN framework; the importer of record holds the conformity dossier. Vietnam's grid is 220 V single-phase, 50 Hz, so nominal voltage/frequency test conditions are close to China's single-phase 220 V, 50 Hz. Confirm the exact mandatory conformity scope and CR-mark requirement for the specific luminaire type with the designated certification body.
summary.zh: 面向越南市场的 LED 灯具按 TCVN IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验）进行电气安全评定，即越南采用的 IEC 60598-1，并结合适用于具体灯具类型的相关第 2 部分（TCVN IEC 60598-2-x）。该标准涵盖防触电（接触电流、绝缘电阻、爬电距离和电气间隙）、热保护、机械强度、布线和端子及耐热耐火。安全合格支持 QCVN 框架下的整体合格评定及 CR 标志流程；进口登记人持有合格卷宗。越南电网为 220 V 单相、50 Hz，因此标称电压/频率试验条件与中国单相 220 V、50 Hz 相近。请就具体灯具类型与指定认证机构确认确切的强制合格范围及 CR 标志要求。
summary.zht: 面向越南市場的 LED 燈具按 TCVN IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗）進行電氣安全評定，即越南採用的 IEC 60598-1，並結合適用於具體燈具類型的相關第 2 部分（TCVN IEC 60598-2-x）。該標準涵蓋防觸電（接觸電流、絕緣電阻、爬電距離和電氣間隙）、熱保護、機械強度、布線和端子及耐熱耐火。安全合格支持 QCVN 框架下的整體合格評定及 CR 標誌流程；進口登記人持有合格卷宗。越南電網為 220 V 單相、50 Hz，因此標稱電壓/頻率試驗條件與中國單相 220 V、50 Hz 相近。請就具體燈具類型與指定認證機構確認確切的強制合格範圍及 CR 標誌要求。

standards_or_laws: TCVN IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (Vietnamese adoption of IEC 60598-1)
TCVN IEC 60598-2-x — Luminaires — Part 2: Particular requirements for the specific luminaire type (Vietnamese adoption of IEC 60598-2 series)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; the edition change also moved the designation from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T, while CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by the applicable CNCA rules. Both GB 7000.1 and TCVN IEC 60598-1 derive from IEC 60598-1, so the safety engineering is largely common. CCC testing is conducted by CNCA-authorised laboratories; Chinese CCC and GB 7000.1 evidence are not automatically accepted for the Vietnamese QCVN/CR conformity pathway.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；此次换版也将标识由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T，而范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定。GB 7000.1 与 TCVN IEC 60598-1 均源自 IEC 60598-1，安全工程基本共通。CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行；中国 CCC 及 GB 7000.1 证据不自动被越南 QCVN/CR 合格路径所接受。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；此次換版也將標識由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T，而範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定。GB 7000.1 與 TCVN IEC 60598-1 均源自 IEC 60598-1，安全工程基本共通。CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行；中國 CCC 及 GB 7000.1 證據不自動被越南 QCVN/CR 合格路徑所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; IEC 60598-1-based)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: TCVN IEC 60598-1 and China's GB 7000.1 are both IEC 60598-1-derived, so the luminaire safety engineering is largely common and existing test data transfers technically — including the favourable fact that Vietnam's 220 V single-phase 50 Hz grid matches China's single-phase 220 V, 50 Hz nominal conditions (China's three-phase distribution is 380 V, not relevant to single-phase luminaire testing). The gaps are procedural: (1) Vietnamese conformity is assessed against the QCVN/CR framework through a designated certification body — a Chinese GB 7000.1 report or CCC certificate is not automatically accepted, although the shared IEC base reduces re-testing; (2) the in-country importer of record must hold the conformity dossier and arrange the CR mark where the luminaire is in QCVN scope; (3) marking, warnings, and instructions must be in Vietnamese; (4) confirm the applicable Part 2 (TCVN IEC 60598-2-x) for the specific luminaire type and any Vietnamese national deviations. Plan for a separate Vietnamese conformity exercise even where the product already holds Chinese CCC.
gap.zh: TCVN IEC 60598-1 与中国 GB 7000.1 均源自 IEC 60598-1，灯具安全工程基本共通，既有检测数据技术上可迁移——包括越南 220 V 单相 50 Hz 电网与中国单相 220 V、50 Hz 标称条件一致这一有利因素（中国三相配电为 380 V，与单相灯具检测无关）。差距为程序性：（1）越南合格评定依 QCVN/CR 框架经指定认证机构进行——中国 GB 7000.1 报告或 CCC 证书不自动被接受，但共享 IEC 基础减少重测；（2）境内进口登记人须持有合格卷宗，并在灯具属 QCVN 范围时安排 CR 标志；（3）标志、警告及说明须为越南语；（4）请就具体灯具类型确认适用的第 2 部分（TCVN IEC 60598-2-x）及任何越南国家偏差。即使产品已持有中国 CCC，也应规划单独的越南合格评定。
gap.zht: TCVN IEC 60598-1 與中國 GB 7000.1 均源自 IEC 60598-1，燈具安全工程基本共通，既有檢測數據技術上可遷移——包括越南 220 V 單相 50 Hz 電網與中國單相 220 V、50 Hz 標稱條件一致這一有利因素（中國三相配電為 380 V，與單相燈具檢測無關）。差距為程序性：（1）越南合格評定依 QCVN/CR 框架經指定認證機構進行——中國 GB 7000.1 報告或 CCC 證書不自動被接受，但共享 IEC 基礎減少重測；（2）境內進口登記人須持有合格卷宗，並在燈具屬 QCVN 範圍時安排 CR 標誌；（3）標誌、警告及說明須為越南語；（4）請就具體燈具類型確認適用的第 2 部分（TCVN IEC 60598-2-x）及任何越南國家偏差。即使產品已持有中國 CCC，也應規劃單獨的越南合格評定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory by scope — TCVN IEC 60598-1 (with the applicable Part 2) is the safety basis; conformity certification and the CR mark are required where the luminaire falls within the applicable QCVN scope — confirm with the designated certification body
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where in CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard moved from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST/STAMEQ), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaire electrical safety in Vietnam rests on TCVN IEC 60598-1 (plus the applicable Part 2), sharing the IEC 60598-1 base with China's GB 7000.1, and Vietnam's 220 V single-phase 50 Hz grid matches China's single-phase nominal conditions, so existing test data transfers technically. However, Vietnamese conformity through a designated body, the CR mark where in scope, an in-country importer of record, and Vietnamese-language marking are separate obligations not satisfied by a Chinese GB 7000.1 report or CCC certificate. Confirm the applicable Part 2 and mandatory scope with the designated certification body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南 LED 灯具电气安全以 TCVN IEC 60598-1（及适用的第 2 部分）为基础，与中国 GB 7000.1 共享 IEC 60598-1 基础，且越南 220 V 单相 50 Hz 电网与中国单相标称条件一致，故既有检测数据技术上可迁移。但经指定机构的越南合格评定、范围内的 CR 标志、境内进口登记人及越南语标志均为独立义务，不被中国 GB 7000.1 报告或 CCC 证书满足。请就适用的第 2 部分及强制范围与指定认证机构确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南 LED 燈具電氣安全以 TCVN IEC 60598-1（及適用的第 2 部分）為基礎，與中國 GB 7000.1 共享 IEC 60598-1 基礎，且越南 220 V 單相 50 Hz 電網與中國單相標稱條件一致，故既有檢測數據技術上可遷移。但經指定機構的越南合格評定、範圍內的 CR 標誌、境內進口登記人及越南語標誌均為獨立義務，不被中國 GB 7000.1 報告或 CCC 證書滿足。請就適用的第 2 部分及強制範圍與指定認證機構確認。

requirement_topic.en: LED Driver / Control Gear Safety (TCVN IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: LED 驱动器 / 控制装置安全（TCVN IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: LED 驅動器 / 控制裝置安全（TCVN IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: LED drivers (control gear for LED modules) intended for the Vietnam market are assessed against TCVN IEC 61347-2-13 (Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), read with TCVN IEC 61347-1 (general requirements), the Vietnamese adoption of IEC 61347. The standard specifies isolation/insulation class, dielectric strength, thermal endurance, fault conditions, and safety marking for LED drivers. Where a driver is supplied as a separate product, its safety evidence supports its own conformity within the QCVN/CR framework; where integrated into a luminaire, the driver evidence forms part of the luminaire conformity dossier alongside TCVN IEC 60598-1. Confirm with the designated certification body whether the specific driver configuration and power range trigger standalone CR-mark conformity or are covered within the luminaire-level conformity.
summary.zh: 面向越南市场的 LED 驱动器（LED 模块控制装置）按 TCVN IEC 61347-2-13（灯控装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）评定，并结合 TCVN IEC 61347-1（一般要求），即越南采用的 IEC 61347。该标准规定 LED 驱动器的绝缘等级、介电强度、热耐久性、故障条件及安全标志。若驱动器作为独立产品供应，其安全证据支持其在 QCVN/CR 框架内的独立合格；若集成于灯具内，则驱动器证据与 TCVN IEC 60598-1 共同构成灯具合格卷宗的一部分。请与指定认证机构确认具体驱动器配置及功率范围是否触发独立 CR 标志合格，还是纳入灯具级合格。
summary.zht: 面向越南市場的 LED 驅動器（LED 模組控制裝置）按 TCVN IEC 61347-2-13（燈控裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）評定，並結合 TCVN IEC 61347-1（一般要求），即越南採用的 IEC 61347。該標準規定 LED 驅動器的絕緣等級、介電強度、熱耐久性、故障條件及安全標誌。若驅動器作為獨立產品供應，其安全證據支持其在 QCVN/CR 框架內的獨立合格；若集成於燈具內，則驅動器證據與 TCVN IEC 60598-1 共同構成燈具合格卷宗的一部分。請與指定認證機構確認具體驅動器配置及功率範圍是否觸發獨立 CR 標誌合格，還是納入燈具級合格。

standards_or_laws: TCVN IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (Vietnamese adoption of IEC 61347-2-13)
TCVN IEC 61347-1 — Lamp controlgear — Part 1: General requirements and safety (Vietnamese adoption of IEC 61347-1)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 19510.14-2014 (Control gear for lamps — Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), read with GB 19510.1 (general requirements), technically aligned with IEC 61347. CCC certification may be required for LED drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market. Chinese GB 19510.14 reports and CCC certificates are not automatically accepted under the Vietnamese QCVN/CR conformity pathway, although the IEC 61347 technical base is shared.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求），并结合 GB 19510.1（一般要求），技术上与 IEC 61347 对齐。在中国居民市场，特定功率范围内的 LED 驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证。中国 GB 19510.14 报告及 CCC 证书不自动被越南 QCVN/CR 合格路径所接受，尽管共享 IEC 61347 技术基础。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求），並結合 GB 19510.1（一般要求），技術上與 IEC 61347 對齊。在中國居民市場，特定功率範圍內的 LED 驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證。中國 GB 19510.14 報告及 CCC 證書不自動被越南 QCVN/CR 合格路徑所接受，儘管共享 IEC 61347 技術基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR)
GB 19510.1 — Lamp controlgear — Part 1: General requirements and safety (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: TCVN IEC 61347-2-13 and China's GB 19510.14 are both IEC 61347-2-13-derived, so the driver safety engineering is largely common and existing test data transfers technically — and the 220 V single-phase 50 Hz Vietnamese supply matches Chinese single-phase nominal input conditions. The gaps are procedural: (1) if the LED driver is sold as a standalone product in Vietnam, confirm whether it requires its own QCVN conformity and CR mark, or whether it is covered within the luminaire-level conformity when integrated; (2) the in-country importer of record must hold the conformity dossier; (3) a Chinese GB 19510.14 report or CCC certificate does not automatically satisfy the Vietnamese pathway, although the shared IEC base reduces re-testing; (4) marking must follow Vietnamese requirements; (5) check whether the specific driver power/voltage range and configuration triggers CCC in China versus the corresponding Vietnamese QCVN scope. Plan a separate Vietnamese conformity step for standalone drivers.
gap.zh: TCVN IEC 61347-2-13 与中国 GB 19510.14 均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，驱动器安全工程基本共通，既有检测数据技术上可迁移——且 220 V 单相 50 Hz 越南供电与中国单相标称输入条件一致。差距为程序性：（1）若 LED 驱动器在越南作为独立产品销售，须确认其是否需要独立的 QCVN 合格及 CR 标志，还是在集成时纳入灯具级合格；（2）境内进口登记人须持有合格卷宗；（3）中国 GB 19510.14 报告或 CCC 证书不自动满足越南路径，但共享 IEC 基础减少重测；（4）标志须遵循越南要求；（5）请核查具体驱动器功率/电压范围及配置在中国触发 CCC 的情况与相应越南 QCVN 范围。对独立驱动器应规划单独的越南合格步骤。
gap.zht: TCVN IEC 61347-2-13 與中國 GB 19510.14 均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，驅動器安全工程基本共通，既有檢測數據技術上可遷移——且 220 V 單相 50 Hz 越南供電與中國單相標稱輸入條件一致。差距為程序性：（1）若 LED 驅動器在越南作為獨立產品銷售，須確認其是否需要獨立的 QCVN 合格及 CR 標誌，還是在集成時納入燈具級合格；（2）境內進口登記人須持有合格卷宗；（3）中國 GB 19510.14 報告或 CCC 證書不自動滿足越南路徑，但共享 IEC 基礎減少重測；（4）標誌須遵循越南要求；（5）請核查具體驅動器功率/電壓範圍及配置在中國觸發 CCC 的情況與相應越南 QCVN 範圍。對獨立驅動器應規劃單獨的越南合格步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional/Mandatory by scope — TCVN IEC 61347-2-13 (with 61347-1) is the driver safety basis; standalone drivers may require their own QCVN conformity and CR mark, while integrated drivers are covered within the luminaire conformity — confirm with the designated certification body
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (power-range dependent) — CCC may be required for LED drivers in certain ranges under CNCA-C10-01; GB 19510.14-2014 is the applicable safety standard

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST/STAMEQ), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED driver safety in Vietnam rests on TCVN IEC 61347-2-13 (with 61347-1), sharing the IEC 61347 base with China's GB 19510.14, and the 220 V single-phase 50 Hz supply matches Chinese single-phase nominal conditions, so existing test data transfers technically. Standalone drivers may need their own QCVN conformity and CR mark, while integrated drivers are covered within the luminaire conformity — confirm with the designated certification body. A Chinese GB 19510.14 report or CCC certificate does not automatically satisfy the Vietnamese pathway, and an in-country importer of record plus Vietnamese marking remain separate obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南 LED 驱动器安全以 TCVN IEC 61347-2-13（及 61347-1）为基础，与中国 GB 19510.14 共享 IEC 61347 基础，且 220 V 单相 50 Hz 供电与中国单相标称条件一致，故既有检测数据技术上可迁移。独立驱动器可能需要自身的 QCVN 合格及 CR 标志，集成驱动器则纳入灯具合格——请与指定认证机构确认。中国 GB 19510.14 报告或 CCC 证书不自动满足越南路径，境内进口登记人及越南语标志仍为独立义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南 LED 驅動器安全以 TCVN IEC 61347-2-13（及 61347-1）為基礎，與中國 GB 19510.14 共享 IEC 61347 基礎，且 220 V 單相 50 Hz 供電與中國單相標稱條件一致，故既有檢測數據技術上可遷移。獨立驅動器可能需要自身的 QCVN 合格及 CR 標誌，集成驅動器則納入燈具合格——請與指定認證機構確認。中國 GB 19510.14 報告或 CCC 證書不自動滿足越南路徑，境內進口登記人及越南語標誌仍為獨立義務。
